title: Submit Login Form With All Fields Empty Shows Required Field Errors
description: Verifies that submitting the login form without entering any credentials displays inline validation errors for both the email/username and password fields, and does not trigger a network request or loading state.
expected_result: Both the email/username and password fields display inline required-field error messages. No loading state is shown, no network request is fired, and the user remains on the login page.

test_steps.expected: Login page is loaded and the URL is /login

test_steps.action: Click the submit button without filling in any fields
test_steps.expected: Form submission is attempted; no loading spinner appears

test_steps.action: Verify inline validation error is shown for the email/username field
test_steps.expected: An error message such as 'Email or username is required' is visible beneath the email/username field

test_steps.action: Verify inline validation error is shown for the password field
test_steps.expected: An error message such as 'Password is required' is visible beneath the password field

test_steps.action: Verify the page URL has not changed — no redirect occurred
test_steps.expected: User remains on /login; no redirect to dashboard or any other page
